No Poverty.reason: No direct or indirect evidence in the course syllabus supports contributions to eradicating poverty or related targets.

Quality Education.reason: As a required university course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and develops analytical skills for professional employment (Target 4.4), aligning with Model B's original assessment.
evidence: 協助同學進一步認識股票市場的遊戲規則 (assist students to further understand the rules of the game of the stock market)
